placements.overview:
The TG ICET 2026 registration deadline has been extended for admission to the MBA and MCA courses. Students can now register till Mar 23, 2026, (without a late fee) for the exam scheduled for May 13 and May 14, 2026.

Established in 2009, Sagar Institute of Technology (SITECH Hyderabad) is located in Hyderabad, Telangana. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 6 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

Sagar Institute of Technology (SITECH Hyderabad) offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Sagar Institute of Technology (SITECH Hyderabad) offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech and MBA/PGDM. Sagar Institute of Technology (SITECH Hyderabad) fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,16,000 to 1,40,000.

individual_reviews.title: Nice academics with good faculty.

content.Placements: 80% placements in decent companies, with the highest package in 2022 being 9 LPA. Placements are obtained from Infosys, Wipro, etc. Great learning experience with good faculty and academics. Develops system engineers and network specialists for many multinational companies.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are good, and the infrastructure is good on the college premises. They have campus Wi-Fi, good labs, the best classrooms, and a big library. Actually, there is no hostel, but many paying guest rooms are there nearby the college. Food is the best in the college canteen.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Better college for good faculty and good placements for students.

content.Placements: Almost 80 percentage of students were placed in the placements interviews in big companies like tcs and Wipro and Capgemini and HCl etc. Along with maximum package of 3.5 Lacs per year and the minimum package of 1.9 Lacs per annum. Almost 80 percentage of students were selected in my course in big companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college had well developed facilities like play ground with all types of sports and games were conducted there for both boys and girls. And also well computerized library also available for study and communication. Each floor having huge range of Wi-Fi for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Experienced faculty. Good hostel facility. Good placements .

content.Placements: Nearly 200 members got placed in our college. The highest package got is 9.5. Recruited companies are capgemini, Wipro, Accenture, Tech Mahindra, Hexaware, Infosys, IBM. We done internship in 4-1, but present in our college 1-2 sem only they are providing internship for students.
content.Infrastructure: We have a good Wi-Fi in the labs and library. Lab work was done theoretically. Classrooms are neat and pleasant. We have much of books in Library. Hostel facility is good. All books (story books, subject books, general knowledge books) are available in our library.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in my college are very good I. e like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library and so on. The quality in my hostel is very neat and clean. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is also good. Medical and sports are good.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, with Wi-Fi provided and good labs with computers. Classrooms have all facilities. Hostels are not available on campus, but outside accommodation is available. Canteen offers all items at a cheap cost with good taste. Sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: Nice academics with good faculty.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good, and the infrastructure is good on the college premises. They have campus Wi-Fi, good labs, the best classrooms, and a big library. Actually, there is no hostel, but many paying guest rooms are there nearby the college. Food is the best in the college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Better college for good faculty and good placements for students.
reviews.review_text: The college had well developed facilities like play ground with all types of sports and games were conducted there for both boys and girls. And also well computerized library also available for study and communication. Each floor having huge range of Wi-Fi for students.

reviews.review_heading: Experienced faculty. Good hostel facility. Good placements .
reviews.review_text: We have a good Wi-Fi in the labs and library. Lab work was done theoretically. Classrooms are neat and pleasant. We have much of books in Library. Hostel facility is good. All books (story books, subject books, general knowledge books) are available in our library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college infrastructure and faculty are good.
reviews.review_text: Labs, libraries and classrooms are all good. Wi-Fi is available but not accessible without permission and it's too slow. There is no hostel facility available; we have to rent rooms outside of town. It has a small canteen for breakfast and lunch and a small playground for games like volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good placements.
reviews.review_text: We have a good Wi-Fi facility and good lab equipment. Digital classrooms are also available at our college, and we have a good library at our college. We don't have a hostel at our college. In the early days, we had a college hostel, but later it closed. Our college has a good locality.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the best college in kadapa district.
reviews.review_text: We have the best infrastructure for my course like Circuits, Systems, the best library, and a Wi-Fi facility. We have only girls hostel which is situated about 5 kms from the college. So I don't know very much about the hostel facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Pursuing engineering at Vaagdevi College is a waste.
reviews.review_text: Vaagdevi College has a library but has no new books. We have very few books that are usable. If those books are taken, they must be returned in less time. Wi-Fi is available, but we can't access it. There is also a canteen in our college, but it is not useful. Sports facilities are not good.

reviews.review_heading: This college is average, with no proper practical knowledge.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi, computer laboratories were good, but need more explanation, classes were good, no visual representation, and the library was good. There was no hostel for boys, canteens were good, but all items were not available, games were poor and no proper ground at the time of the game period, and sometimes students were not allowed on the ground.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good facilities and staff members.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and labs are well-cleaned. Each section or each subject has a separate laboratory and workshops. The quality of the food served is good. The library and workshops have highly moderated equipment.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied because of good placements in 2020, and apart from that everything is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college. In electronics and communication engineering department we have well-equipped different laboratories. Besides the computer labs, campus is Wi-Fi enabled to provide 24x7 internet connectivity. The college central library has textbooks, journals, and English newspapers. Our college hostel is 5 km away from the college. The quality of food available at canteen and mess is above average. Our college has a good infrastructure for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities and the placements are increasing year by year.
reviews.review_text: I'm from ECE dept. All our labs are equipped with required and working equipments. C and data structures labs are having high-speed internet and Wi-Fi connections. Library contains all kinds of books for each course and also contains different journals and magazines. Digital library is also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the college because they don't provide good placements and teachers.
reviews.review_text: There were Wi-Fi labs, but the problem was that they don't work properly. The library was good as we had many books for reading and writing. You can learn a lot in the library. There is no hostel for boys, but girls hostel facility is provided at a far away by the college.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with extracurricular activities, and course subjects are not updated.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides all the facilities like digital classrooms and special rooms which can allow 70 students in each room and each section has 50 students. Our college has specialised labs, and all lab assistants are well-experienced. Our college and hostel are not in the same place, but girls can have hostel facility which is 5 km far from the college. Canteen is good, and the library is well-equipped with many books. Our college gives special importance to sports like cricket, volleyball, bad...

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
reviews_list.review_title: In short, it is one of the best colleges for engineering.

review_content.Placements: The campus placements are not fixed, but few companies which visit for placements are Adani, Rotomax, Birla Cement, and AMW. Most of the students come from middle and south Gujarat, and they are not ready to join the company. In 2016, the placement percent was 65 for mechanical department, whereas the placement percent was 90 for IT and computer science departments.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. The campus premises are clean. Every day, cleaning is done. There is a garden with green lawns and trees. There is a two-storey building. There are 9 buildings connected to each other through corridors with a width of around 500 metres. There are separate buildings for different departments.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Veerayatan group of institutions F.O.E. And F.O.M.

review_content.Placements: The placements are not that good, and some small companies visit our college for recruitment and the package offered will be very less. During my placements, a company has come for recruiting, but after six months it got shut down. But now companies come for the civil and mechanical department, and college staff will help you to clear the interview process also, like aptitude and practicals.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is Pretty good. All the hostel and college buildings are elegant to look, and we have a playground also. The hostel rooms are Spacious, good sunlight, and air circulation. The taste of the mess food is average. And as the college is outside of the city you will not find anything unusual.

review_summary.college_name: Arham Veerayatan Institute of Engineering, Technology and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Students in GTU are gold medalists and toppers.

content.Placements: Placements in the college are good. Every year, almost 80% of the students get placed in different companies. Companies such as Adani, Adani Solar and many more visit the college to hire the students. Students get a good opportunity to study and to get placements in good companies. Around 60% of the students of our senior batch got placed in the college placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is superb, beautiful, and the best in Kutch. The atmosphere of the college is great for studies and extracurricular activities. We have lovely gardens and above 100 trees all around the college. There is a great ground for cricket. We also have a badminton court underground, and a big stadium for the students to play.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: The college has good infrastructure, but it is in remote location.

content.Placements: The companies like AMW and Sanghi Cement visit the campus for the placements. Only one student recruited by Sanghi Cement and no one got recruited by AMW. The one recruited by Sanghi Cement also didn't join due to the terms and conditions of a company. Also, Sanghi Cement is situated at a remote location.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is marvellous on the campus. You get all the amenities on the campus to enhance your technical skills. The sports pavilion is also built for indoor and outdoor games. The gym facility is also available. The canteen is not so good on the campus. The hostel rooms are good. The infrastructure is newly built and well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: In short, it is one of the best colleges for engineering.

content.Placements: The campus placements are not fixed, but few companies which visit for placements are Adani, Rotomax, Birla Cement, and AMW. Most of the students come from middle and south Gujarat, and they are not ready to join the company. In 2016, the placement percent was 65 for mechanical department, whereas the placement percent was 90 for IT and computer science departments.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. The campus premises are clean. Every day, cleaning is done. There is a garden with green lawns and trees. There is a two-storey building. There are 9 buildings connected to each other through corridors with a width of around 500 metres. There are separate buildings for different departments.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2015
individual_reviews.title: Veerayatan group of institutions F.O.E. And F.O.M.

content.Placements: The placements are not that good, and some small companies visit our college for recruitment and the package offered will be very less. But now companies come for the civil and mechanical department, and college staff will help you to clear the interview process also, like aptitude and practicals.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is Pretty good. All the hostel and college buildings are elegant to look, and we have a playground also. The hostel rooms are Spacious, good sunlight, and air circulation. The taste of the mess food is average. And as the college is outside of the city you will not find anything unusual.

individual_reviews.course: M.E. in Machine Design - Batch of 2016

content.Other: The campus is really very nice and the teaching in the degree and diploma streams are also good. The faculty members are really cooperative and helpful to the needy. The campus has a greenery all around and a silent atmosphere that is the best for studies as well as concentration during the classes. Also, the campus has Wi-Fi facility and a big library as well.

faqs.question: Q: Are there any specializations offered by Sree Krishna College of Engineering?

faqs.answer: Sree Krishna College of Engineering has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu. Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate. Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply. Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced. Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile. Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

faqs.question: Q: Which courses does Daripally Anantha Ramulu College of Engineering and Technology offer to students?

faqs.answer: Daripally Anantha Ramulu College of Engineering and Technology has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations. Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis. The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH, 2003). No maximum age limit.B.E. / B.TechCandidates who have passed or appeared at the final year of the Diploma examination in Engineering conducted by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh or any other examination recognised as equivalent thereto by the State Board of Technical Education and Training, Telangana / Andhra Pradesh. Candidates should have completed 16 years of age, as on 31st December of the year of admission. There is no upper age limit.After 10th DiplomaCandidates must have passed 10th examination conducted by State Board of Secondary Education, Andhra Pradesh/ Telangana or from any other recognised board in India with Mathematics as one of the subjects, and obtained at least 35% marks in the qualifying examination. Candidate must have passed all the subjects including Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, with minimum of 35% Marks in each subject. Candidates who appeared or are appearing for SSC or equivalent examination being held in March/April-2023, and whose results are yet to be declared are also eligible.

individual_reviews.course: Masters of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: They only offer a degree .

content.Placements: Regarding placement, they offer jobs related to sales profiles mainly, but they fail to bring other specializations companies for MBA. They always tell you to look for a job by yourself rather than depending on the college for it. It is not at all worth it.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good they offer a good IT lab, investment lab, power BI lab, and library with related books. Classrooms have smart classes but they don't allow Wi-Fi access to students and hostel infrastructure is also very good but a bit expensive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of my college and course.

content.Placements: Approximately 7 LPA is offered by Wipro. 90% of the students from my college receive about a 7 LPA. The college provides the best opportunities to secure jobs in top companies, which is very helpful for us. About 90 to 98% of students get placed in our college. The best thing about our college is that it offers excellent facilities and great job and internship packages for students.
content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available. The quality of the food in the hostel is good, and all medical facilities are provided. Sports and games facilities are provided. The quality of all the facilities is nice. The infrastructure of the college is the best. The lab, classes, and library facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: Masters of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I chose the number one in Noida.

content.Placements: The percentage of placement in the college is 99%, and the highest package is 22 LPA for the MBA. The average package is 4 LPA per year for the students. Top companies are like Mahindra, Microsoft, Flipkart, Amazon, and many more. A minimum of 200 companies come here.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very good for the girls and boys. Also, the food is very healthy and tasty. The rooms are clean and maintained. The medical facilities are very good; they are available 24/7. There are open and indoor sports facilities as well. There is a bus service also available for marketing once a week.

individual_reviews.course: Masters of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Our college provides good faculty members and infrastructure.

content.Placements: MBA is a post-graduate course. Students who are interested in making a career can opt for an MBA course. Around 50% of students got placed in this course. Our college provides decent placement opportunities after completing this course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good. There is a big park for playing sports. There is a decent library, and several books are available. Classrooms are well-maintained. There are two air-conditioners in each classroom.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very good. They are experienced and well-qualified. The teaching quality is better. They provide the right direction in any situation so that students can study well. Industrial visits are also conducted by faculty members.

individual_reviews.course: Masters of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Lloyd business school is good for studies.

content.Placements: 60-70% of students were placed in my course. Minimum 4 Lacs of salary offered. Flipkart, Amazon, hdf etc. Companies are recurring in my course. content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available for your course or department Wi-Fi, lab, classroom, library is to good as better in my case. Just I can stay in hostel so can't define about it. In my course department of infrastructure surrounding is good .

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and Business & Management Studies. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech. Whereas, at PG level, Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management offers courses such as MBA/PGDM. Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management fee structure for all the courses is around INR 1,33,000 to 2,44,800.

faqs.answer: A:    Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management offers Degree courses including 6 UG and 1 PG courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management has specializations such as B.Tech specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Civil Engineering.
faqs.question: Are there any specializations offered by Lucknow Model Institute of Technology and Management?

review_content.General: Actually, on the portal page, the campus looks cool, but on ground-level, the building is under construction. Wi-Fi facility is available only near director's room. The hostel facility is average. Girls hostel was the worst as it was not fixed, but boys hostel was fixed. Sports and games are available only once in a year to day-scholars and hostellers. If you only want a degree, then you are welcome.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2015
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Placements in our college are not much good. Students have to go on their own for their basic facilities. You can't be dependent on the college. It just provides you with the basic facilities required like normal study materials. Moreover, you can get the examination centre at Ambalika Institute or in Azaad, but the placements are not very good.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has good buildings and a well-finished floor. It is a 4-floor building and has big rooms with a lot of space for sitting and studying. The quality of the building is solid. Learning facilities are very good. You can manage your free time according to your study.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with college because of lack of facilities,placements, and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Actually, on the portal page, the campus looks cool, but on ground-level, the building is under construction. Wi-Fi facility is available only near director's room. The hostel facility is average. Girls hostel was the worst as it was not fixed, but boys hostel was fixed. Sports and games are available only once in a year to day-scholars and hostellers. If you only want a degree, then you are welcome.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: It has good buildings and a well-finished floor. It is a 4-floor building and has big rooms with a lot of space for sitting and studying. The quality of the building is solid. Learning facilities are very good. You can manage your free time according to your study.

College HMR has built quite a repo in past two years. Teachers and college collectively are putting in great efforts to improve college throughout. The only disadvantage would be the location of the college. That’s the only con of the college that makes it worse from any other college from IP University. review_content.General: The infrastructure of the college is fairly good, but the building is kind of old. They have opened a school in the civil engineering building and shifted our batch to another building. The infrastructure of the lab is not good, and all the instruments are old and distorted. There are no lab assistants and no particular repairs to the equipment. The library has 5-6 years old books, and they do not renew them which causes a major problem to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I was quite disappointed with the college.

review_content.Placements: There are no good placements in this college. The companies that attend our campus for placements are of the other fields rather than engineering. No special steps are taken to provide great placements as such. There were no placements in 2017, and no technical company came for placements. Some companies were of insurance other were of financial sectors. No company hired for a technical position in companies. At most 20% of the students got jobs, so the ratio is not quite good here. The students are not taught about how to tackle the interviews, and even the course we are taught is not related to the job in any way. The highest package which one can find being here is 3 LPA.

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: Electrical Engineering professionals are engineering jack of all trades, as they make use of their knowledge of Physics and Mathematics along with computer programming skills to develop intricate circuit systems. These circuit boards run electrical signals to and from electrical components to accomplish everything from a mundane computer startup to controlling absolute power and precision of a rocket going out of earth's atmosphere.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: What do Electrical Engineering professionals do?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The average BTech CSE salary for graduates in India can range between INR 4 LPA and INR 12 LPA. The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: Marudhar Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: I am absolutely dissatisfied with our college because there are no placements.

content.Placements: Only 10% of the students have taken admission in our course. There are no placements, and none of the companies visits our college for placements. Still, some students prepare on their own to get jobs. A few students get government jobs. Only 1% of the students got internships from our course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities provided in the library, hostel and our department were good. In the library, the Wi-Fi facility was good, and good books and magazines were provided in the library. The quality of the food available in the mess and canteen was very good. Every year, our college celebrates annual function and sports week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: This college was very good for students at a time, but it is not up to the mark now.

content.Placements: There are no placements provided for our batch. When we asked our principal about this, he always ignored us by saying we called the companies and if the companies confirm, then we'll be informed through the notice boards. There were no placements for other branches like computer science engineering, electronics and communications, mechanical, and electrical engineering also. I was very hopeful about placements when I took admission in the college, but the college has ruined my degree.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is fairly good, but the building is kind of old. They have opened a school in the civil engineering building and shifted our batch to another building. The infrastructure of the lab is not good, and all the instruments are old and distorted. There are no lab assistants and no particular repairs to the equipment. The library has 5-6 years old books, and they do not renew them which causes a major problem to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I was quite disappointed with the college.

content.Placements: There are no good placements in this college. The companies that attend our campus for placements are of the other fields rather than engineering. No special steps are taken to provide great placements as such. There were no placements in 2017, and no technical company came for placements. Some companies were of insurance other were of financial sectors. No company hired for a technical position in companies. At most 20% of the students got jobs, so the ratio is not quite good here. The students are not taught about how to tackle the interviews, and even the course we are taught is not related to the job in any way. The highest package which one can find being here is 3 LPA.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the management team, lack of facilities and co-curriculum activities.

content.Placements: The placements are normal. No special steps are taken to provide great placements as such. There were no placements in 2017, and no technical company came for placements. Some companies were of insurance other were of finance sectors. No company hired for a technical position in companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of college is great, but there is no cooler or AC in the classrooms. Labs are MS and well-managed. The library is good, but books are not revised in it. There are no medical facilities available. There is no word called sports in the dictionary of this college. Poor quality of food is available here.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: In my views if possible skip this college.

content.Placements: There is nothing good about this college. Most of the time the companies which visit are mass recruiter and they just take students at very low package. There is literally no assistance from college side they will not help in interviews and even not provide with the tips to tackle the tricky situations. The average package is quite low around 2 LPA. The only visiting companies are tcs and hcl. There is no placement cell and most of the companies offer job in back end developments for technical department.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is not that good. The building is old and lacks some basic amenities like a water purifier and a proper ventilation in classrooms. This all adds up to make life more difficult in summers. There is big football ground but not well maintained. There is a library but most books are of old editions and even no proper sitting facility there. The canteen food is average and if you cant find anything with you then you can a take a meal there. Labs are not properly equipped and there id no hostel facility provided in campus.

reviews.review_heading: Pool for opportunities. Come and grab yours !
reviews.review_text: The building is near the main market so the place is crowded and also lot of noise. There is no facilities for recreations. Just the basic things are here like a small ground for some outdoor activities. Also no Wi-Fi equipped so little unfair in today generation. The classroom was also like old times, no projectors no air conditioners. In the summer it turns out to be a challenge sitting in the class.

reviews.review_heading: A college disciplined and having satisfactorily average environment fulfilling every norms.
reviews.review_text: It has quite all the facilities but a multi purpose seminar hall and not a big auditorium, rest everything is fine. Sports ground need to maintained and sports period once or twice a week should be included in timetable. Library is very well furnished and equipped with all books available. The campus place worth 130 acre can be utilized more.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Marudhar Engineering College, Raisar, Bikaner.
reviews.review_text: This college has a good infrastructure. The college labs are nice, but some of them do not have such good quality as others. Food available for the hostelers is average, but sometimes it's good, overall, we can say that it is average.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied as there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is average. There is a basketball ground available on the campus, not other sports. The labs are quite good. The medical facilities were very poor. The quality of classrooms was good. The food quality in the canteen is average. The hostel rooms are good. There is no infrastructure related issues.

reviews.review_heading: In MEC college, last year 50-60 students were placed.
reviews.review_text: In the Marudhar Engineering College, the Wi-Fi facility is available in all the buildings. The labs and classrooms are fully ventilated and had lab equipment. In the library department, all the books are available here. The campus of Marudhar Engineering College is fully green.

reviews.review_heading: The experience was mixed, better than ECB
reviews.review_text:
Basic infrastructure with the best labs. The lab equipment is sufficient and good.
They have everything in a good condition.
They have even got more than they would use. If you want, you can use them according to you.

It's overall good.
They have a playground and have sufficient space.
The college campus is 136-acre large and well connected to the highway.

reviews.review_heading: No placement chances depend on your own calibre and at your own risk.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the only accountable feature if we have to put some point in favour of our college. There is a huge campus area like a field, some greenery is a positive point in the desert surrounding area, good parking & transportation are available separately for faculty and students.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is AICTE-approved, has a good infrastructure and is fully secure
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is very good and completely earth fault secure. It has 4 building fully furnished with a healthy environment and a peaceful location situated far away from the city.

college_info.intro: Aditya Group of Institutions offers BTech and BSc as its flagship courses. Both courses are offered at the UG level in full-time mode. BSc is offered in the Nursing stream and is affiliated with Rajiv Gandhi University of Health Sciences. On the other hand, BTech is offered for the duration of 4 years. BTech specialisations Computer Science and Engineering, Data Science, Electronics and Computer Science. BTech is affiliated with the Visvesvaraya Technological University. reviews_list.review_title: Very good college according to the fee charges and environment.

review_content.Placements: Placements at Adhitya College of Engineering are good. Many companies, like Google and other companies, provide placements. We have an internship program every week. Almost 85% of the students get placed here. The highest package was 25-30 LPA, and the lowest was 8.65 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure here is good, and it has nice ventilation. The area around the college is surrounded by greenery, and the scenery is beautiful. classrooms are well-maintained and neat. Labs and library are great, and the nearby hostels are also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the infrastructure of both the college and hostel, no placement.

review_content.Placements: 49% on average, it would be around 40-49%, which is average and should be more. 4 lacs, 2.4 lacs, and 3 lacs are the most appropriate. Zuventus is the leading company that was hiring students only for MR jobs, nothing else. No research.
review_content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi, simple labs, simple classrooms, average library where there are more restrictions than the books that are actually needed. The worst hostel with double-decker Bed (6 pax in a single room), average canteen, no medical facilities, decent auditorium.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: One of the good and best college to choose.

review_content.Placements: The placements are yet to be known because it is newly opened, but the other branches of Aditya College have offered various placements with good packages around 25-30 Lacs per year. Various companies hire the students and the internship field is nice, good to go.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good, well-maintained, and clean. The surrounding areas are wonderful, full of greenery, and the best part is you will have a peaceful site with very good ventilation. According to me, it is good in the fresh greenery area.

faqs.answer: Yes, you can join Aditya Group of Institutions with 60% in Class 12. The minimum requirements for UG courses vary between 35% and 50%, depending on the course. With 60%, you can get admission into BTech, BSc, BCA, and BCom courses. You can apply online and get admission on merit.
faqs.question: Q: Can I take admission to Aditya Group of Institutions with 60% in Class 12?

faqs.answer: Aditya Group of Institutions has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityBBACandidate must have passed in class 10+2 from a recognised board.B.Sc.Candidate must have passed in Pre- University Course (PUC) or equivalent / 12th /A' level.BCACandidates who have completed Three Years Diploma in Engineering in Karnataka State or an equivalent course are also eligible.B.ComA candidate who has passed Diploma in Business Administration examination conducted by the Directorate of Technical Education, Karnataka are also eligible.M.PharmaCandidates belonging to SC/ST/Category-I (Karnataka) having only pass marks in B.Pharma. are eligible to apply.BPTInterested Candidate should have passed class 10+2 or equivalent from a recognised board.B.PharmaCandidate must have passed Diploma in pharmacy (D. Pharm.) from a Pharmacy Council of India, recognised institute.Pharm.DCandidate should have completed the age of Seventeen Years as on 31st December of 2023.M.Sc.Candidate must be registered with the State Nursing Council as a registered nurse and registered midwife. For candidates having Post Basic B.Sc. in Nursing degree, no experience is needed.B.ArchCandidate who have passed 10+3 Diploma Examination with Mathematics as compulsory subject with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a recognised Institute/ University can also apply. Candidates appearing for 10+3 Diploma with Mathematics in the current year may also provisionally appear for NATA-2023.B.Sc. (Post Basic)Candidates must have passed Diploma in General Nursing and Midwifery after 10+2 or equivalent examination from any recognised institute.GNMInterested Candidate should have passed class 10+2 with English having 40% of marks in vocational ANM course from the school recognised by Indian Nursing Council or 10+2 with English having 40% of marks in Vocational Stream-Health care Science from a recognised CBSE board/State/Centre or Registered ANM with pass mark
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility to get admission in Aditya Group of Institutions for UG/PG courses?

faqs.answer: Aditya Group of Institutions is a reputed institute for BBA, B.Sc., BCA, B.Com, M.Pharma, Ph.D., BPT, B.Pharma, Pharm.D, D.Pharma, M.Sc., B.Arch, B.Sc. (Post Basic), GNM, MBA/PGDM. Students can opt these programs to pursue their career in Business & Management Studies, Science, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Medicine & Health Sciences, Nursing, Architecture & Planning. Institute has trained & experienced faculty who deliver these programs. Aditya Group of Institutions has a review rating of 4.4 on the basis of reviews by students. In addition to this, it has been rated 4.5 on campuslife, 4.3 on placements, 4.5 on faculty and 4.5 on Infrastructure.

individual_reviews.title: One of the best colleges for pharmacy students.

content.Placements: Minimum 90% of students will get placements from our college. The average package is 12 LPA. The lowest average package is 6 LPA. The college is very good at placements. It has a connection with good and big top companies. One of the best colleges for placements.
content.Infrastructure: This college has one of the best infrastructure. I am a Pharma.D student. Classrooms are good and labs are too clean. Library is also good, we will get required books from library. The hostel is also good. The canteen food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best choosing college ever.

content.Placements: I had the opportunity to experience the placement process at BMS College of Engineering, and there's my review based on my experience. The university has a dedicated placement cell that organizes placement drives every semester. The highest package offered is 30 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is located on campus, making it very convenient for attending classes. Rooms are share, and the space isn't huge. It is sufficient for the basic needs of students like a library, a playground, a seminar hall, classrooms, and a canteen. The food provided is decent.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with the infrastructure of both the college and hostel, no placement.

content.Placements: 49% on average, it would be around 40-49%, which is average and should be more. 4 lacs, 2.4 lacs, and 3 lacs are the most appropriate. Zuventus is the leading company that was hiring students only for MR jobs, nothing else. No research.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi, simple labs, simple classrooms, average library where there are more restrictions than the books that are actually needed. The worst hostel with double-decker Bed (6 pax in a single room), average canteen, no medical facilities, decent auditorium.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Data Sciences - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the good and best college to choose.

content.Placements: The placements are yet to be known because it is newly opened, but the other branches of Aditya College have offered various placements with good packages around 25-30 Lacs per year. Various companies hire the students and the internship field is nice, good to go.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is good, well-maintained, and clean. The surrounding areas are wonderful, full of greenery, and the best part is you will have a peaceful site with very good ventilation. According to me, it is good in the fresh greenery area.

admission_process.title: Aditya Group of Institutions Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Aditya Group of Institutions admission 2025 isopen. The institute offers admission to courses such asMBA, BSc, BTech BCA, and BComat the UG level and PG level. Aditya Group of Institutions admissions are completelymerit-based. Candidates are required to full fill the basic eligibility to secure seats in UG and PG courses at the college. Moreover, applications for all the courses are accepted in online mode only at theAditya Group of Institutions. Read the below article for more information about Aditya Group of Institutions' admission process, course eligibility and selection criteria:

Aditya Group of Institutions admission is merit-based. The institute considers multiple parameters while offering admission, which include fulfilling the minimum eligibility and selection criteria as per the course requirements. Tabulated below are theAditya Group of Institutions Courseseligibility and selection criteria:
Class 12 with 45% - 50%
Merit-based
Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects
Merit-based
Class 12 with 35%
Merit-based
Class 12 with 35%
Merit-based

Aditya Group of Institutions admission process 2025 contains various steps which are required to be followed by the candidates for admission. The candidates looking for admission must need to full fill out the basic eligibility for admission. Want to know the step-by-stepAditya Group of Institutions admission process 2025, go through the following section.
Step 1: Aditya Group of Institutions Application Process

Candidates looking for admission to various programmes at Aditya Group of Institutions are required to fill out the admission form online. To fill out the application form candidates are required to visit the official website of the college.
Step 2: Aditya Group of Institutions Selection Round

According to the selection criteria, the candidates are required to passClass 10andClass 12for admission to UG programme, candidates must have a graduation degree for admission to PG courses. The college offers direct admission to the candidates based on the last exam qualifying exam score.
Step 3: Final Seat Confirmation
The selected candidates are required to pay theAditya Group of Institutions feewithin the given deadline to secure their seats.

faqs.question: How to get admission to Aditya Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: Aditya Group of Institutions admission 2025 is open. The college offers merit-based admission to all its UG courses. To be eligible for admission candidates must fulfil the eligibility criteria. For instance, UG candidates are required to complete their Class 10 and Class 12 and applicants looking for admission to courses at AGI must have a UG degree or class 12 degree.

faqs.question: Is there an entrance for admission to Aditya Group of Institutions?
faqs.answer: No, there is no entrance exam required for admission to Aditya Group of Institutions. Admission to all the courses is merit-based at this college. Candidates are required to apply to the official website of the college and fill out the admission form. After the process is completed, the final seat allocation is based on the last qualifying exam score.

faqs.answer: There are numerous ways to prepare for an interview and crack it. The three most effective parameters are mentioned below: Confidence- This creates the first impression that will help in further communication Communication Skills- The interviewer looks for a candidate who can put his/ her points with clarity and precision. Even after having sound technical skills, poor communication skills can create a negative impact. Knowledge- Regularly go through newspapers and social media tools to stay updated with current affairs.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2030Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 16 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: One of the best colleges for pharmacy students.
reviews.review_text: This college has one of the best infrastructure. I am a Pharma.D student. Classrooms are good and labs are too clean. Library is also good, we will get required books from library. The hostel is also good. The canteen food is also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Best choosing college ever.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is located on campus, making it very convenient for attending classes. Rooms are share,  and the space isn't huge. It is sufficient for the basic needs of students like a library, a playground, a seminar hall, classrooms, and a canteen. The food provided is decent.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 30 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Very good college according to the fee charges and environment.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure here is good, and it has nice ventilation. The area around the college is surrounded by greenery, and the scenery is beautiful.  classrooms are well-maintained and neat. Labs and library are great, and the nearby hostels are also good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 17 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied with the infrastructure of both the college and hostel, no placement.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, simple labs, simple classrooms, average library where there are more restrictions than the books that are actually needed. The worst hostel with double-decker Bed (6 pax in a single room), average canteen, no medical facilities, decent auditorium.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 27 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: One of the good and best college to choose.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is good, well-maintained, and clean. The surrounding areas are wonderful, full of greenery, and the best part is you will have a peaceful site with very good ventilation. According to me, it is good in the fresh greenery area.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 23 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: A very good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is available in our course. The department of commerce is very good. Wi-Fi is available in our college. We have multiple labs for every sense. Classrooms are very hygienic. The quantity of the food in the hostel is very good in Muscat. We have medical faculty members to see students. We have multiple sports in our college.

reviews.review_heading: It was very excellent college in placement.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a good faculty, including Padmashree and Paul Richards. The labs are well-equipped, and the classrooms are clean and well-ventilated. The college has a good canteen and a variety of sports facilities, including Kabaddi and football.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 19 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Seniors told us that this college was in the top 5 best colleges in 2020. It's a great thing.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our college are what we like. The college structure, and canteen food, are really good. The classroom protection facilities, AC, and also 24*7 electricity. The chemistry lab arrangement is also really nice. Sports are rare during the period when we are completing our exams.

reviews.review_heading: Poor facilities in college and hostel.
reviews.review_text: The number of classrooms is less for our department. The library facility is good. Wi-Fi is not available for the students. The hostel food is the worst one because they didn't maintain hygiene. Some hostels are enough to live in, but some hostels don't have hygiene and facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Aditya College of PhysiotherapyReviewed on 4 Dec 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Almost good atmosphere and nice faculties. The campus is not much big, but education quality is best
reviews.review_text: The hostel is in the model of 2 BHK or 3 BHK apartments, consisting of a kitchen, one room with an attached bathroom, two rooms with a common bathroom, a hall, balcony, and kitchen. In college, we have a smart class system with presentations and projectors, along with a large lab with all facilities.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by Aditya College of Engineering and TechnologyReviewed on 17 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Great Support by the Faculty
reviews.review_text: Separate hostels are available for boys and girls. Bus facilities are available and Wi-Fi is provided. Hostels are under CCTV surveillance, with sufficient space for students. Food is served on time and washing machines are available in the hostel. There are options for 2-sharing, 3-sharing and 4-sharing rooms in the hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and ResearchReviewed on 3 Sep 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Aditya Bangalore Institute of Pharmacy Education and Research.
reviews.review_text: For my course, they provided 24-hour Wi-Fi for college purposes. There were different labs for different subjects where we could conduct our experiments. The classrooms were technologically advanced, equipped with TVs and projectors, and were like smart classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are provided at certain ranges (library, computer lab, wi-fi). Hostel facilities were in a certain range, quality of food was average, and there were no canteen facilities. There are no medical facilities or sports facilities. The quality of food is good.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: At the UG and PG levels, GGS College of Modern Technology (GGS Mohali) offers a diverse range of progammes. Candidates can choose Full Time courses, from streams like Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. College offers B.E. / B.Tech courses at the UG level. While, at the PG level, the college offers available programmes like MBA/PGDM and MCA. The GGS College of Modern Technology (GGS Mohali) course fee ranges between INR 1,20,000 to 2,41,850.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Very good experience and excellent services given by college.

review_content.Placements: GGS is professionally driven college, renowned academicians and senior functionaries of Top MNC's guide our systems and lay the roadmap for future endeavors. 100% placement. Personal development programme will also help you to develop your skills and knowledge. These programs will help you to understand what the organisation need.
review_content.Infrastructure: GGS is professionally driven college, renowned academicians and senior functionaries of Top MNC's guide our systems and lay the roadmap for future endeavors. The GGS ensures excellence through flexible and interdisciplinary academic model matching the international standards.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I think that the students have to study to get their placements quickly from our college.

review_content.Placements: Our college has very good placements in many companies of the telecom and cement sector. Also, Tech Mahindra and such companies visit the campus. Also, the CSE students can join bank or software company like the Microsoft, Dell, HP, etc. Also, EE students can join for the jobs in Indian railway, Metro Rail, etc. As we know, the placements here are very good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has a very big campus, where we can play football, volleyball, basketball, cricket and other games. The whole campus of our college is Wi-Fi enabled, and our college has a digital classroom, laboratory, library, seminar hall, computer lab, etc.In our college, we have a college week where all the sports are included for playing.

review_summary.college_name: GGS College of Modern Technology (GGS Mohali) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Review of GGS College of Modern Technology (GGS Mohali).

content.Placements: The percentage of students who get placements is 90%. The highest package is 48 LPA. The average package is 8 LPA. Top companies recruiting students from our college are Google, Microsoft, Amazon, Flipkart, Wipro, etc. The percentage of students who get internships is 75% in companies like Wipro and Infosys.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure is very beautiful with a cool climate. The college provides Wi-Fi 24 hours a day. Labs are very helpful, and classrooms are good. The library has all types of books. Hostel facilities are very good, like rooms and food quality. The college has two canteens. There are good facilities for sports and medical.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with placements, but satisfied with all the aspects of college.

content.Placements: Around 5 students got placed through college placements. The highest salary offered was Rs. 15,000 per month and the lowest was Rs. 7,000 per month. MNCs and others companies visit the college to hire students. Roles offered to the placed students were good. Around 20% of the students got internships from the college. I don't know about the highest and lowest stipend offered to students during the internship. There is no placement cell in the college.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities like a library, internet labs, Wi-Fi, sports and games are provided for students in the college. Quality of labs and classrooms is good, and quality of food available in the canteen is good. Facilities like Wi-Fi, sweepers, playground, TV room and gym are available in the hostel. I haven't faced any issues related to the infrastructure of the college.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Very good experience and excellent services given by college.

content.Placements: GGS is professionally driven college, renowned academicians and senior functionaries of Top MNC's guide our systems and lay the roadmap for future endeavors. 100% placement. Personal development programme will also help you to develop your skills and knowledge. These programs will help you to understand what the organisation need.
content.Infrastructure: GGS is professionally driven college, renowned academicians and senior functionaries of Top MNC's guide our systems and lay the roadmap for future endeavors. The GGS ensures excellence through flexible and interdisciplinary academic model matching the international standards.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I think that the students have to study to get their placements quickly from our college.

content.Placements: Our college has very good placements in many companies of the telecom and cement sector. Also, Tech Mahindra and such companies visit the campus. Also, the CSE students can join bank or software company like the Microsoft, Dell, HP, etc. Also, EE students can join for the jobs in Indian railway, Metro Rail, etc. As we know, the placements here are very good.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has a very big campus, where we can play football, volleyball, basketball, cricket and other games. The whole campus of our college is Wi-Fi enabled, and our college has a digital classroom, laboratory, library, seminar hall, computer lab, etc.In our college, we have a college week where all the sports are included for playing.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely not dissatisfied, the placement is not good, but a few students get placed.

content.Placements: I want to get placed in the college, but don't know about the college, if they are capable enough to place me or not. A few companies came to the college and took only a few students. Sometimes the companies didn't come to the college. The college failed to bring the companies to the campus, so sometimes we missed the placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good, and the faculty members are also good and friendly, but the faculty keeps changing after every six months or a year. The classrooms are good. The campus and the hostel are Wi-Fi enabled. There is no major medical facility on the campus and in the hostel. The food that is provided in the hostel mess is disgusting. The taste of the food is changing when a new student takes admission.

paragraphs: GGS College of Modern Technology (GGS Mohali) admission process is both merit and entrance-based, depending on the course. It offers courses at the UG and PG levels. Candidates who are selected for admission must pay the course fee to secure their seat.

Admission to this course is offered based on a valid score in CBSE 12th and PSEB 12th. Students can choose from 5 specialisations such as Electrical Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering and Mechanical Engineering among others. To complete the GGS College of Modern Technology (GGS Mohali) admission process for the 2025 batch, selected candidates must pay the applicable course fee ofINR 2,40,000 - 2,41,850.

review_summary.college_name: Swamy Vivekananda Engineering College Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: The college has well-equipped labs.

content.Placements: Sixty-five percent of my course's students were hired by TCS or Infosys. The highest package is INR 7 LPA, the lowest package is INR 3.3 LPA, and the average package is about INR 3.8 LPA. TCS, Infosys, Tata Steel, and Jindal Steel Pvt. Ltd. are the top recruiting companies for my course. Junior Engineer and software engineer roles are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: This college has well-equipped labs, and the classrooms have more fans. This campus has more trees, so it is full of greenery. This college has a big library with all semester text books, all competitive books, novels, all entrance exam preparation books like GATE and CAT, and all types of daily newspapers. This college does not have a hostel, but it has a good canteen where the food is awesome. There are no medical facilities, and this college has a big field to play cricket and football. And this college has a separate basketball court.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college is best as of money. Because some students have not much money.

content.Placements: Campus placement was not doing in the college. The students attend offcamps for jobs. The college was not supported for campus placements. There is no companies come to college for giving placement. So students can not place the companies. And also students can not got internship. Because of college faculty cannot provide internship giving companies.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi was not available in the college. Classrooms and infrastructure are good, and college campus are large. The library are not better. But provide good facilities as much as possible. The labs are good and lab assistants are easy to mingle. With students and explain well. There is no hostel facility to college. But They provide free bus facilities. The sports room are in the college. And canteen facility are not good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Our college is neither very good nor very bad.

content.Placements: National level and other companies from the public and private sector of the country visit our campus to hire students. Aditya Group of Institution will offer a salary of Rs. 13,000 per month. Around 70 students got selected in campus drives.
content.Infrastructure: Some equipment in our college is good, but there is no internet facility here. The library, classrooms and Wi-Fi facility in our college are good and well-equipped. Sports facilities are not bad, and medical facilities are good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: Review of Swamy Vivekananda Engineering College.

content.Placements: No companies came to our campus for internships. But faculty members support to do internships in academics. If they know any companies or if they have any contacts, they will inform students. Good companies like TCS and Wipro visited the campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: I am proud to be a part of this college. They provide a good platform in both academics and co-curricular to exhibit our talents. It was a lush green campus with good infrastructure and atmosphere.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college were experienced and professionals. They all were very friendly but were strict in studies. All the professors and associate professors were much experienced. They supported us very much in completing our projects.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The worst decision of my life was to join this college.

content.Placements: The college does not provide any internship or in-plant training. As it is a small college it tries its best to provide all the opportunities for the students at a minimal cost. I did not do any internship till now and I am planning to do it in December in Visakhapatnam. There is no stipend amount being given but we need to pay the amount for doing the internship.
content.Infrastructure: There are almost all the facilities that we require but the transport facilities must be increased and bus routes should be made for remote areas also. They should take care of the extracurricular facilities and should conduct them in large numbers like technical symposiums and fests, These are the remarks that I want to highlight about the college. Though it is a small college it has a very pleasant ambience.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with all the facilities in the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has good infrastructure, and the labs are also good. Many food items are available in our canteen. They also send the students for Eenadu championship cricket tournament. The college is near to the hospital,  where all medical problems are also cured.

reviews.review_heading: The campus is good for the peaceful life.

college_info.college_name: Vijayanjali Institute Of Technology: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Reviews, Info

highlights.summary: The OJEE 2026 registration process has begun for Vijayanjali Institute Of Technology admission to BTech, BPharma, MBA, and MCA programmes. The final date to register is Mar 22, 2026. Additionally, the exam dates are tentatively scheduled for May 4 and May 5, 2026, and from May 7 to May 9, 2026.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2014
reviews_list.review_title: I am dissatisfied with our college, and our college is average.

review_content.Placements: About 10% of the students get placed from our college. The highest salary package offered here is 4 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered is 2.5 LPA. The average salary package offered is 3.5 LPA. Spicer India Private Limited is the top recruiting company here. None of the students got internships from our branch. Graduate engineer is the top role offered in our branch.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities of our department are the worst, and Wi-Fi is not available. Classrooms are not neat and clean, and the library facilities are not good. Facilities in the hostel are very disgusting, and the quality of the food served is low. The canteen is not hygienic, and only first aid is available for medical facilities in the college. There is no playground.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Really, Vijayanjali is good for engineering.

review_content.Placements: 70% of students were placed in this college. The highest monthly package is 45k and the lowest package is 16k. Most valuable companies are offering placements here like Tata, Birla, Lenskart, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college campus is good with all the good facilities and nice infrastructure. Wi-fi is available 24 hours. There are labs, a private canteen, air-conditioned classrooms, and a beautiful garden. The college campus is good and free from ragging.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers are very talented, qualified, and knowledgeable. The lectures are very engaging with students which helps in their semester examinations as well. There are many good technologies in good laboratories. Overall, the college campus is good with good staff.
